name: Drip Irrigation Calculator
seo_description: Drip Irrigation Calculator. Area to irrigate, Dripper spacing, Row spacing — get Pipe (+15%), Drippers, Sectors instantly for your plumbing and water.
example_label: Calculate drip irrigation system for 100m2 garden with drippers at 0.3m spacing.

range_hints.separacion_goteros_cm: Goteros: 30-50cm according to rate of cultivo
range_hints.separacion_lineas_m: Líneas: 1-2m according to alcance of the gotero

result_context: To {area_m2}m² se need {lineas_ud} líneas of irrigation, {goteros_ud} goteros, {tuberia_m}m of pipe main and {filtro_ud} filtro of {caudal_lph} L/h.
formula_display: Líneas = area ÷ (largo × separación); Goteros = (largo ÷ sep_goteros) × líneas
steps: Caudal total: 175 × 4 L/h = 700 L/h (needs filtro and programador)
mistakes: No instalar filtro (The goteros se tapan fácilmente)
No Consider pressure of red (puede necesitar reductor)
Espaciar demasiado The líneas (zonas without irrigation)
description: Drip irrigation design based on area, dripper spacing and flow rate.
desc: Calculate pipes and drippers for irrigation systems.
